title: Learn C
description: Learn C programming language within a month using our practical course. Write tons of code, solve over 500 coding problems and build beginner level projects. Master the basic syntax and build a solid foundation for your programming journey.

modules.name: Getting started with C
modules.description: Write your 1st C code and Learn how to make C print whatever you want.

problems.name: Print a Greeting Based on Time of Day
How to Print a Message in C
MCQ - Printing the Percent Symbol in C
